action.reasoning: Observation: sketch_heavy augmentation hurt (20.35% vs 21.18% best). Analysis: Too aggressive augmentation reduces feature quality. The best result used moderate sketch augmentation. Decision: Try domain-weighted sampling (upweight sketch domain 3x), moderate augmentation, and train for 15 epochs. Also prepare DINOv2 ensemble.
